name: portfolio_tracker
description: Track portfolio performance: unrealized P&L per position, total portfolio value, sector allocation, and returns. Persists holdings to local storage.
instructions: Call with {"action": "status"} to view current portfolio. Use {"action": "add", "ticker": "AAPL", "shares": 50, "cost_basis": 150.00} to add a holding. Use {"action": "remove", "ticker": "AAPL"} to remove. Use {"action": "set", "holdings": [...]} to set entire portfolio.
